Converts PDC files to PNG format and includes a build script for compiling the tool.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Converts PDC files to PNG format by reading and processing image or sequence data.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling the `pdc2png` tool with specified source files, includes, and environment settings.
